description_long: This skateboard features a classic double-kick deck with a bold red and black checkerboard pattern covering the entire top surface. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, likely maple, with a slightly concave shape for better foot grip and control. The wheels are white, medium-sized, and attached to standard metal trucks, suitable for street or park skating. The trucks are mounted underneath the deck and are likely made of aluminum alloy, providing durability and stability. The checkerboard design is visually striking and gives the skateboard a retro, urban aesthetic. No visible brand logos or additional graphics are present on the deck, wheels, or trucks.
description: A skateboard with a red and black checkerboard deck, white wheels, and standard metal trucks. The design is bold and retro, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard and the checkerboard deck pattern.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the deck, white wheels, and metal trucks beneath the board.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rounded tail and the continuation of the checkerboard pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the deck, wheels, and trucks visible.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a bold red and black checkerboard pattern covering the entire top surface, with no additional imagery, text, or motifs.
attribute_wheel_type: classic, white, medium-sized, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, silver metal trucks with traditional mounting, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Checkerboard pattern in red and black, fully covering the top of the deck, no cut-outs or additional graphics
